query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN musicGenerationId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_gen_id, SUM(CASE WHEN lyrics IS NOT NULL AND lyrics != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_lyrics FROM tracks;
